pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated com.sun.xml.bind jaxb-impl with the standard org.glassfish.jaxb jaxb-runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: The com.sun.xml.bind artifacts are internal/removed in newer JDKs and may not be available or stable; switching to the official GlassFish implementation ensures runtime availability of JAXB.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support the --release 21 flag or Java 21 language features, causing build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze classes compiled for Java 21, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.
